div.h1: Bandwidth Comparison: Full State vs Delta

ul.li: Sends entire state (S) to all N-1 peers
Bandwidth: O(N × S) per node per round
Does NOT scale - 1GB/round at 1000 nodes! Delta-Based Gossip:
Sends only changes (Δ) to fanout peers (k)
Bandwidth: O(k × Δ) - constant regardless of N
SCALES - same 3KB/round at any cluster size Assumptions:
